name: platform-engineering
description: Platform-engineering (internal developer platform) team — 3 agents (platform-architect, developer-portal-engineer, golden-paths-and-adoption-engineer) for the paved-road layer above CI/CD, Kubernetes, IaC, and observability: platform-as-product and Team Topologies (stream-aligned / platform / enabling teams, the thinnest viable platform), the developer portal and software catalog (Backstage / Port / Cortex / OpsLevel, catalog-info ownership, scaffolder templates, TechDocs, scorecards), self-service golden paths and guardrails-as-defaults (Terraform modules / Crossplane / Score / Kratix), and platform adoption measured as a product (DORA + DevEx/SPACE, platform SLOs, paved-road coverage). A decision-tree knowledge bank (build-vs-buy IDP + paved-road-vs-guardrail + the platform-API surface), 10 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 1 advisory hook, scenarios, templates. Seams: pipelines -> devops-cicd; clusters -> cloud-native-kubernetes; IaC modules -> terraform-iac; SLOs -> observability-sre; cloud primitives -> aws/azure/gcp-cloud. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
